artifact: SkillGenBench paper and pinned official release acquisition

paper.title: SkillGenBench: Benchmarking Skill Generation Pipelines for LLM Agents
paper.extraction_method: pdftotext -layout; removed control bytes other than tabs, newlines, and form feeds and stripped trailing whitespace while preserving UTF-8 text and page breaks

release.license: No license granted in the pinned release: no LICENSE/COPYING file exists and README.md line 126 states TBD.
release.paper_release_timing: The pinned commit is dated 2026-05-15, three days before arXiv v1 submission on 2026-05-18, so it is a paper-preceding candidate release. Acquisition establishes pinned availability, not byte identity with every artifact used for paper results.
release.release_boundary: The full 407,510,785-byte zip snapshot is preserved locally and archive-tested but not committed; complete GitHub tree metadata, commit metadata, README, and provenance are versioned. Acquisition did not run benchmark containers, regenerate skills, or reproduce paper scores.

text_spot_checks: title, abstract, immutable arXiv v1 marker, and repository URL
agent evaluation instruction and required Skill-tool use
verification.source_archive_test: tarfile parse succeeded; 33 members and 30 files

acquisition_scope: Created verifiable local full-paper and pinned-release evidence for the queued review. No deep review, benchmark reproduction, skill-generation-quality claim, professional-validity claim, or agent-capability claim is made.
